title: galipea jasminiflora var. febrifuga
intro: Galipea jasminiflora var. febrifuga, also known as Yellow Ginger or Quassia, is a plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Galipea jasminiflora var. febrifuga include its effectiveness in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used to treat various health issues, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
